Report posted to Telegram topic 701. Memory updated.

Mid-week check posted to Telegram topic 701. Summary of what was found:

**Portfolio:** ÔéČ43,488 | +ÔéČ661 unrealised (+1.5% on cost). No Friday snapshot on file ÔÇö this was the baseline run.

**Key flags:**
- Air France (-7%) is the live concern ÔÇö directly in the crossfire of the Iran oil shock and Hormuz threat
- Novo Nordisk (-20.6%) remains the persistent drag
- Nokia (+26.3%) and Amundi Stoxx 600 (+11.1%) are the top performers

**Macro:** The Iran war dominated the week ÔÇö oil hit $100/bbl Monday before retreating to ~$85 on Trump's "ending soon" comments. European equities took a ~5.5% hit last week and are partially recovering. Situation remains fluid; watching for de-escalation or re-escalation signals.
